title: VimFu — zz Center Cursor
description: zz scrolls the screen so the cursor line is at the vertical center. Essential for keeping context visible while editing.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file — needs enough lines to scroll

steps.say: Z Z scrolls the screen so your cursor line is in the center. It doesn't move the cursor, it moves the viewport.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: cursor near top, center it ---

steps.say: The cursor is on line one. Jump to line fifteen.
Line fifteen is near the bottom. Z Z to center it.
Now line fifteen is in the middle of the screen. Code above and below is visible.
The cursor is at the very bottom. Z Z.
Centered again. You can see both the function above and below.
Z Z. Center the cursor line. Use it whenever you want more context around your code.
